use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH INSOMNIA, CHARACTERIZED BY DIFFICULTIES WITH SLEEP ONSET AND/OR SLEEP MAINTENANCE

indications.text:
DAYVIGO is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with insomnia, characterized by difficulties
with sleep onset and/or sleep maintenance [see Clinical Studies (14.1)].
